instruction: The red notification badge on the at sign icon got recolored off-white. Restore its original color.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/at-sign.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><path d="M16 8v5a3 3 0 0 0 6 0v-1a10 10 0 1 0-3.92 7.94"/></g>
  <circle id="badge" fill="#fafafa" cx="104" cy="24" r="6" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/at-sign.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><path d="M16 8v5a3 3 0 0 0 6 0v-1a10 10 0 1 0-3.92 7.94"/></g>
  <circle id="badge" fill="#e63946" cx="104" cy="24" r="6" />
</svg>
